team_name: Explainable AI with Human-in-the-Loop for Reliable Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis.
summary: Design an AI-powered system that automates tender evaluation, ensures transparency through explainable outputs, verifies eligibility, and provides clear reasoning behind each decision. The system also includes document parsing and analysis, human-in-the-loop validation for critical decisions, and bias reduction.
constraints_addressed: Inconsistencies and delays in manual analysis
